description: Noble ocean warriors from the Elemental Plane of Water, patrolling the deep against abyssal threats.
subraces: Trench-dwelling sentinels standing vigil against krakens and abyssal horrors in crushing darkness.
Reef-city builders cultivating living coral architecture and trading with surface folk.
Seaweed-cloaked guerrillas ambushing intruders from swaying underwater groves.
